stemHtml: The purpose of correctly setting the leading and trailing edge devices on the wing of an aeroplane during take-off, approach and landing is to:

options.a: reduce stall speed and drag during take-off and landing.
options.b: reduce stall speed, increase C<sub>LMAX</sub> with minimum increase in drag for take-off, but with a relatively high drag for approach and landing.
options.c: increase stall speed and C<sub>LMAX</sub> during take-off, but reduce stall speed with a relatively high drag during approach and landing.
options.d: reduce the take-off roll and increase the landing roll.
